page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7.16xlarge is a compute-optimized instance powered by the Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. It features 64 dedicated physical cores with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, delivering 64 vCPUs. The instance is equipped with 128.0 GB of RAM, providing a 2.0 GB per core memory allocation. It does not include local storage or GPU hardware, relying on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks indicate strong multi-core capabilities, with the stress-ng multi-core CPU test and PassMark CPU score ranking in the top 25%. The processor supports advanced instruction sets including AVX, AVX512F, and AVX512_VNNI, which contribute to strong performance in multi-threaded bzip3 decompression and PassMark CPU encryption tests. Memory performance is also robust, with PassMark memory scores and database operations placing in the top 25%, while read and write memory bandwidth benchmarks fall within the average range.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the instance offers high resource density for compute-heavy workloads without the overhead of bundled local storage or GPU accelerators. It is well-suited for multi-threaded applications, database operations, cryptography, and small-scale language model inference, where its dedicated CPU allocation and 32 Gbps network bandwidth can be fully utilized.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7.16xlarge is an x86_64 compute-optimized instance featuring 64 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz. It is configured with 128.0 GB of RAM, yielding 2.0 GB of memory per core, and does not include local storage or GPU accelerators. The instance provides a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps. Benchmark results demonstrate strong multi-core CPU performance, multi-threaded decompression, and encryption capabilities, all placing in the top 25%. It also shows strong performance in database operations and small-scale LLM inference. Lacking local storage, it relies on network-attached storage. This hardware profile makes the instance highly suitable for compute-intensive workloads, multi-threaded data processing, cryptographic tasks, and database operations requiring dedicated CPU resources.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7.16xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 64 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 128 GB RAM, and 32 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering strong multi-core and database performance.

tagline: A dedicated sixty-four core compute-optimized instance delivering strong multi-threaded performance and high-speed network bandwidth for intensive workloads.

128.0 GB of RAM providing a 2.0 GB per core allocation
